"THAT TRIAL COURTS ARE TO LIBERALLY PERMIT SUCH AMENDMENTS, AT ANY STAGE OF THE PROCEEDING, HAS BEEN ESTABLISHED POLICY IN THIS STATE SINCE 1901." (HIRSA V. SUP. CT. (1981) 118 CAL.APP.3D 486, 488-89; SEE ALSO CCP 428.50(C).) THE TRIAL DATE IN THIS CASE IS NOVEMBER 20. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2024 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-14-2023 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-23-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion
Off Calendar May-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF YUK CHIN'S Amended Motion.

Plaintiff's "motion to insert Uber Technologies Inc. in place of Doe 11" is granted. "That trial courts are to liberally permit such amendments, at any stage of the proceeding, has been established policy in this state since 1901." (Hirsa v. Sup. Ct. (1981) 118 Cal.App.3d 486, 488-89; see also CCP 428.50(c).) The trial date in this case is November 20.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion
Off Calendar May-12-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff, YUK WAN CHIN's MOTION TO INSERT UBER TECHNOLOGIES INC. IN PLACE OF DOE 11.

Continued to be heard on the law and motion calendar (room 302) on 5/24/23 at 9:30 a.m. per the amended notice of motion.

Judge Pro Tem: Jeffrey Wohl, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
